description: Read the process monitoring requirements from ~/Desktop/process_monitoring_requirements.txt. Then, configure five individual process monitors on the localhost device (127.0.0.1) in OpManager. If the localhost device is not already in the inventory, add it using SNMP v2c (community: public). The five monitors must exactly match the specified process names: postgres, java, snmpd, cron, and sshd. Credentials: admin / Admin@123 at http://localhost:8060.
